item.title: Why is Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 20-Mar, Vijaya Diagnostic Centre Ltd's share price has declined by 2.39% to ₹902.25, continuing a downward trend amid underperformance relative to the broader market and sector benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Homesfy Realty Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Mar, Homesfy Realty Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 5.0% to close at ₹128.25. This drop reflects a continuation of the stock’s underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Artemis Electricals & Projects Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 20-Mar, Artemis Electricals & Projects Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling 5.22% to ₹16.71. This drop comes amid a series of disappointing quarterly financial results and underperformance relative to both its sector and broader market indices. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is MRP Agro Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Mar, MRP Agro Ltd’s stock price fell sharply by 6.81% to close at ₹85.03, nearing its 52-week low. This decline reflects a combination of disappointing quarterly financial results and sustained underperformance relative to market benchmarks over the past year. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Hardwyn India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Mar, Hardwyn India Ltd’s stock price rose by 4.99% to ₹18.74, continuing its strong upward trajectory despite a challenging sector environment and some concerning financial indicators. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Parin Enterprises Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Mar, Parin Enterprises Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 9.26% to close at ₹575.30. This sharp drop reflects a broader underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, signalling investor caution despite the company’s strong long-term returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: As of 20-Mar, Nakoda Group of Industries Ltd’s stock price has fallen by 3.13% to ₹24.11, reflecting ongoing challenges in the company’s financial health and market performance despite a brief recent uptick in weekly returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Britannia Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20-Mar, Britannia Industries Ltd witnessed a decline in its share price, falling by 0.9% to close at ₹5,627.95. This drop comes amid a short-term downtrend despite the company’s robust long-term performance and solid financial metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: On 20-Mar, Shaival Reality Ltd's stock price rose by 3.12% to ₹33.00, marking a new 52-week high and reflecting robust investor confidence despite broader market weakness. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: On 20-Mar, Genus Paper & Boards Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 2.71% to close at ₹10.79. item.title: Why is Shah Metacorp Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 20 Mar, Shah Metacorp Ltd’s stock price fell by 2.75% to ₹4.60, continuing a two-day downward trend despite the steel sector’s gains and the company’s strong long-term returns. This decline reflects a complex interplay of recent weak financial results, investor caution, and valuation considerations. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: On 20-Mar, GEE Ltd’s stock price fell by 1.85% to close at ₹61.93, continuing a downward trend that has seen the share price decline over recent weeks and months, underperforming both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.description: As of 20-Mar, GTN Industries Ltd's stock price has shown a modest rise of 0.29% to ₹23.94, reflecting a nuanced market response amid contrasting financial indicators and sector dynamics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Ginni Filaments Ltd falling/rising?

item.title: Why is Perfect Infraengineers Ltd falling/rising?

item.title: Why is Aerpace Industries Ltd falling/rising?
